attributes.description: Category ID to attribute the impression to.
attributes.name: category

description: Sets Active Data context for tracking.
title: <isactivedatacontext>

description: Suppresses Active Data tracking for the surrounding block.
title: <isanalyticsoff>

description: Exit the enclosing `<isloop>` immediately.
title: <isbreak>

attributes.description: `relative` (TTL) or `daily` (until midnight site time).
attributes.name: type

attributes.description: TTL hours (0-24).
attributes.name: hour

attributes.description: TTL minutes (0-59).
attributes.name: minute

attributes.description: `price_promotion` to vary by customer segment.
attributes.name: varyby

attributes.description: `on` to enable, `off` to disable for this template.
attributes.name: status

description: Configures page caching.

sections.body:
- `<iscache>` only takes effect on the top-level rendered template, not includes.
- Disable with `<iscache type="relative" hour="0" minute="0"/>` when serving personalized content.
sections.heading: Tips

title: <iscache>

description: ISML comment block — body is never rendered.
title: <iscomment>

attributes.description: Component type identifier.
attributes.name: type_id

description: Renders a Page Designer component (legacy).

sections.body: - Prefer the script-side `PageMgr.renderRegion(...)` API for new development.
sections.heading: Tips

title: <iscomponent>

attributes.description: MIME type. Defaults to `text/html`.
attributes.name: type

attributes.description: Response charset. Defaults to `UTF-8`.
attributes.name: charset

attributes.description: When `true`, removes redundant whitespace from the response.
attributes.name: compact

description: Sets the response content type, charset, and compaction.
title: <iscontent>

description: Skip to the next iteration of the enclosing `<isloop>`.
title: <iscontinue>

description: Renders configured cookie disclosures.
title: <iscookies>

attributes.description: Cartridge-relative path of the decorator template.
attributes.name: template

description: Wraps current output in a decorator template.

sections.body:
- The decorator template references the wrapped content via `<isreplace/>`.
- Avoid nesting decorators more than two levels deep — it complicates debugging.
sections.heading: Tips

title: <isdecorate>

description: Fallback branch for an `<isif>` block.
title: <iselse>

attributes.description: ISML expression evaluated when prior branches were false.
attributes.name: condition

description: Branch condition inside an `<isif>` block.
title: <iselseif>

attributes.description: ISML expression. The body renders when truthy.
attributes.name: condition

description: Conditional block. Renders body when `condition` evaluates to true.

sections.body:
- Use `<iselseif/>` and `<iselse/>` for additional branches.
- Conditions are evaluated server-side. Avoid heavy logic — move it into a script and pass a boolean via `pdict`.
sections.heading: Tips

title: <isif>

attributes.description: Cartridge-relative template path. Mutually exclusive with `url`.
attributes.name: template

attributes.description: URL produced by `URLUtils.url(...)`. Mutually exclusive with `template`.
attributes.name: url

attributes.description: Set to `off` to suppress storefront toolkit injection (Active Data scripts).
attributes.name: sf-toolkit

description: Includes another ISML template by `template` or remote URL.

sections.body:
- Use `template` for local includes — this is the common case in cartridges.
- `url` triggers a sub-request against the controller; reserve it for remote/personalized fragments.
sections.heading: Tips

title: <isinclude>

attributes.description: Collection to iterate. Mutually exclusive with `iterator`.
attributes.name: items

attributes.description: Iterator instance. Mutually exclusive with `items`.
attributes.name: iterator

attributes.description: Variable name bound to each element when using `items`.
attributes.name: var

attributes.description: Variable name bound when using `iterator`.
attributes.name: alias

attributes.description: Optional status object exposing `index`, `count`, `first`, `last`, `odd`, `even`.
attributes.name: status

attributes.description: Zero-based index of the first element to render.
attributes.name: begin

attributes.description: Zero-based index of the last element to render (inclusive).
attributes.name: end

attributes.description: Number of elements to advance per iteration.
attributes.name: step

description: Iterates over a collection or iterator.

sections.body:
- Use `<isbreak/>` to exit the loop early and `<iscontinue/>` to skip the rest of the body.
- Prefer `iterator/alias` over `items/var` when iterating large collections — it avoids materializing the full list.
sections.heading: Tips

title: <isloop>

attributes.description: Path to the module template within the cartridge.
attributes.name: template

attributes.description: Tag name developers will use to invoke the module.
attributes.name: name

attributes.description: Attribute name(s) the module accepts. Repeat the attribute for multiple.
attributes.name: attribute

description: Declares a custom ISML tag module.

sections.body: - Place `<ismodule>` declarations in a shared template (often `modules.isml`) included by every page.
sections.heading: Tips

title: <ismodule>

description: Advance the enclosing iterator-mode `<isloop>` to the next element.
title: <isnext>

attributes.description: Object reference, typically from `pdict`.
attributes.name: object

attributes.description: Predefined view name: `detail`, `recommendation`, `searchhit`, `none`.
attributes.name: view

description: Wraps markup so personalization tracking can identify the rendered object.
title: <isobject>

attributes.description: ISML expression to render.
attributes.name: value

attributes.description: One of `on`, `off`, `htmlcontent`, `htmlsinglequote`, `htmldoublequote`, `htmlunquote`, `jshtml`, `jsattr`, `jsblock`, `jssource`, `jsonvalue`, `uricomponent`, `uristrict`, `xmlcontent`, `xmlsinglequote`, `xmldoublequote`, `xmlcomment`.
attributes.name: encoding

attributes.description: Number/date format string (e.g. `#,##0.00`, `yyyy-MM-dd`).
attributes.name: formatter

attributes.description: Timezone reference: `SITE`, `INSTANCE`, or `UTC`. Only used with date formatters.
attributes.name: timezone

description: Prints a value with explicit encoding or formatter.

sections.body:
- Always specify `encoding` when rendering user-supplied values to prevent XSS.
- Use `encoding="off"` only for values that are already HTML and trusted.
sections.heading: Tips

title: <isprint>

attributes.description: Target URL — usually built with `URLUtils.url(...)`.
attributes.name: location

attributes.description: `true` for HTTP 301, `false` (default) for HTTP 302.
attributes.name: permanent

description: Redirects the response to another URL.
title: <isredirect>

description: Server-side script block in B2C Commerce script.

sections.body:
- Use `<isscript>` for `require(...)`, data lookups, and `res.render(...)` calls.
- Prefer moving non-trivial logic into `cartridge/scripts/` modules — `<isscript>` should stay short.
sections.heading: Tips

title: <isscript>

attributes.description: Variable name.
attributes.name: name

attributes.description: ISML expression assigned to the variable.
attributes.name: value

attributes.description: One of `page` (default), `request`, or `session`.
attributes.name: scope

description: Assigns a variable in page, request, or session scope.
title: <isset>

attributes.description: Slot identifier matching the configuration in Business Manager.
attributes.name: id

attributes.description: Free-form description shown in Business Manager.
attributes.name: description

attributes.description: One of `global`, `category`, or `folder`.
attributes.name: context

attributes.description: Required when context is `category` or `folder` — usually `pdict.CurrentCategory` or `pdict.CurrentFolder`.
attributes.name: context-object

description: Renders a content slot configured in Business Manager.
title: <isslot>

attributes.description: Numeric HTTP status (200, 301, 302, 404, 500, …).
attributes.name: value

description: Sets the HTTP response status code.
title: <isstatus>
